templateVersions.content: Assist the agent in an ongoing customer service conversation provided in the CONVERSATION TRANSCRIPT section below. If the customer's words may be considered unethical and inappropriate, you must not repeat the inappropriate words in the response. ### Here are the instructions to follow to generate the output 1. The contextual response does not require any specific information about the organization. 2. The response must naturally fit into the flow of the conversation. 3. The response must be concise and friendly. 4. The response must not repeat things the Agent has already said. Provide exactly one contextual conversational response. ### CONVERSATION TRANSCRIPT: {!$Flow:conv_copilot_vc__GetTscpCall.Prompt} ###RESPONSE You should format the response as the following JSON: { "recommendations": [ { "text": "<answer>" } ] }

templateDataProviders.description: From the copilot panel, gets the transcript for a voice call sent from an associated prompt template and sends the transcript to the associated prompt template as prompt instructions.
templateDataProviders.label: Get Transcripts for a Voice Call in Copilot
